# MTTI Sovereign Agent Runtime

Owner: MT Tech Industries LLC
Category: Sovereignty-grade agentic product runtime
Repository: https://github.com/mttechindustries/4-stage

## Canonical routes

- / — product platform landing page
- /README.md — repository overview and product realization statement
- /docs/ARCHITECTURE.md — technical architecture and module map
- /docs/agent-card.json — machine-readable agent capability card
- /LICENSE — proprietary license notice

## Core package paths

- /src/sovereign_runtime/core.py — runtime primitives
- /src/sovereign_runtime/coherence/pst.py — PST scoring
- /src/sovereign_runtime/coherence/utct.py — UTCT pressure traversal
- /src/sovereign_runtime/coherence/fracture.py — Fracture Tensor engine
- /src/sovereign_runtime/coherence/embodiment_gate.py — build/no-build gate
- /src/sovereign_runtime/qgate/q_gate.py — Q Gate evaluator
- /src/sovereign_runtime/qgate/continuity.py — continuity assessment
- /src/sovereign_runtime/realization/r_operator.py — Realization Operator
- /src/sovereign_runtime/realization/dominance.py — dominance scoring

## Product statement

MTTI Sovereign Agent Runtime is the sovereignty layer for agentic AI: autonomous action with user veto, provenance receipts, coherence monitoring, Q-gated continuity, Realization Operator forecasting, and machine-readable trust.
